analysis.reasoning: Core message: The tweet stresses solidarity and mutual respect as values that keep Europeans united during and after the coronavirus crisis, referencing a Joint European Roadmap. Evaluation: EU1 (successful story) – Not explicitly about historical success or overcoming past traumas; focus is present/future values, so not supported. EU2 (EU is united) – Yes: it emphasizes solidarity and unity during COVID-19 and into the easing of measures, aligning with current unity among member states. EU3 (useful for citizens) – Partially implied via reference to a Joint European Roadmap, but it doesn’t detail concrete EU measures improving lives; the focus is on values rather than practical benefits, so evidence is insufficient. EU4 (avant-garde actor) – No mention of pioneering regulation or leadership beyond values. EU5 (global champion of fair causes) – Not addressed. EU6 (contributes to a better world) – Not addressed; scope is internal EU crisis management. Conclusion: The tweet promotes EU2.
